Risk_Description: Reporter email or contact information may be exposed in public item listings
Mitigation_Action: Display only item information publicly and restrict contact details to authorized administrators

Risk_Description: Unauthorized users may access or modify item status
Mitigation_Action: Implement authentication and role-based access control for administrator functions

Risk_Description: Users may upload copyrighted images that they do not own
Mitigation_Action: Provide upload guidelines and allow only original or authorized images

Risk_Description: Fake or misleading lost and found reports may be submitted
Duplicate reports for the same item may confuse users
Mitigation_Action: Detect duplicate submissions and allow administrators to merge duplicate records

Risk_Description: Uploaded item photos may reveal student faces or personal information
Mitigation_Action: Provide photo upload guidelines and review uploaded images before publication

Risk_Description: Users may have difficulty finding items due to unclear search filters or locations
Mitigation_Action: Improve search filters by adding item categories
